commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But the fields of the city, and its villages, they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh for his possession. Only the houses which the priests occupied, were taken from him. (Calmet) Caleb enjoyed all the dependencies of Hebron, and took the city, as he would not have been secure while the Chanaanites dwelt there. ) Serarius thinks that he abandoned the city to the priests, in which he follows To stat, who supposes that they had to pay tribute to the tribes among whom they lived; and that mines, belonged to the latter. (Menochius).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
